name: Daftra Receipt
html:
{{ doc.company or "Company Name" }}

{{ doc.company_address or "" }}
VAT: {{ doc.company_vat_no or "" }}
** RECEIPT **
Receipt #: {{ doc.name }}
Date: {{ doc.get_formatted("invoice_date") }}
Client: {{ doc.client_name or doc.client }}
{% for item in doc.items %} {% endfor %}
ItemQtyPriceTotal
{{ item.item_name or item.item }}{{ item.qty }}{{ item.rate }}{{ item.amount }}
{% if doc.paid_amount %}{% endif %}
Subtotal:{{ doc.total }}
VAT:{{ doc.tax_amount or 0 }}
TOTAL:{{ doc.total }}
Paid:{{ doc.paid_amount }}
Thank you for your business!
Generated: {{ frappe.utils.now_datetime().strftime("%d-%m-%Y %H:%M") }}
